provenance.author: GitHub Copilot
provenance.context: Semantic capsule describing CobbleWright test suite structure, execution, and maintenance expectations.

intent.primary_goal: Provide one capsule that explains how to run, interpret, and maintain the CobbleWright test suite.
intent.problem_solved: Without a consolidated test capsule, contributors rely on scattered test files and terminal output to understand expected behavior and suite health.

identity.role: A testing contract capsule for CobbleWright.

priorities: run tests from the cobblewright project directory
prefer deterministic unit tests with explicit mocks
cover success and failure paths for plugin behaviors
treat open-handle warnings as defects in lifecycle cleanup
update test documentation when suite size or layout changes

never_do: depend on live network/database services for unit tests
silence failures by loosening assertions without reason
merge test-related changes without running the full suite

diagnostic_guidance.runs_lines: Repeated RUNS lines are normal while Jest workers execute.
diagnostic_guidance.expected_error_logs: Some tests intentionally trigger error paths and may print console.error output as part of validated behavior.
diagnostic_guidance.open_handles: Use --detectOpenHandles to identify timer/resource leaks and fix plugin lifecycle cleanup.

when_adding_tests: add both happy-path and failure-path coverage

trust.note: Derived from current suite output and repository test structure as of 2026-07-19.
